overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Death Stranding showing the protagonist walking along a dark coastal cliffside path at night. The character carries a large illuminated backpack while traversing a narrow trail bordered by a metal fence on the left and rocky terrain on the right, with atmospheric blue lighting and distant lights visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside walking path at night

events.description: character passes a cargo container lying on the ground next to the fence

agents.ego_description: protagonist with large illuminated backpack walking steadily along the coastal trail, silhouetted against the night sky

entered.detail: safety railing running parallel to the path with vertical posts and horizontal rails, marking the edge of the cliff
steep rocky terrain rising immediately beside the path, creating a narrow corridor
faint blue and white lights visible across the water, suggesting distant facilities or structures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark coastal path at night, with the character walking steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail. A metal safety fence runs along the left side marking the cliff edge above the water, while a steep rocky hillside rises on the right. The atmosphere is moody and isolated, with only distant lights visible across the water and the character's backpack lights providing small points of illumination.

events.description: overhead cable structure becomes visible in the distance, indicating approach to a facility or bridge

agents.ego_description: continuing along the coastal path, approaching what appears to be a facility entrance or checkpoint

entered.detail: horizontal cable or pipe structure spanning across the path overhead, becoming more prominent as the character approaches

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the coastal trail as the rocky cliffside recedes into the distance. An overhead cable structure becomes visible, suggesting the approach to a facility or infrastructure point. The metal fence continues along the left side, and the path remains narrow and dark, with the night sky and distant lights maintaining the atmospheric blue tone throughout the sequence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dark coastal cliffside that gradually transitions from a secluded natural trail toward industrial infrastructure. It begins with the character walking steadily forward on a narrow dirt path, flanked by a metal safety fence on the left and a steep rocky hillside on the right. As the character advances through the moody, blue-toned night, the immediate rocky terrain begins to recede into the distance. The scene then shifts as an overhead cable structure emerges from the darkness, suggesting the approach to a facility while the distant lights across the water remain constant. The camera continues its forward trajectory, maintaining the isolated atmosphere as the path leads deeper into the illuminated infrastructure.
